text.title: tracker-gitlab-duo-developer-flow Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for tracker-gitlab-duo-developer-flow as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent flow defined in Duo but invoked via a Slack slash command that takes the user's input verbatim and passes it to the runner.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Slash command bypasses label-trigger discoverability; auditors looking at the project's label history cannot find the run, so reconstructing what happened requires correlating Slack logs with GitLab logs.

failure-mode.description: Workaround pre-18.8 incident #21171 by adding a custom CI job that polls MRs every minute.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Reintroduces the side-runner anti-pattern; the deadlock symptom is hidden but the audit-trail damage and feature-flag misconfiguration remain. Upgrade GitLab instead.
